title: SoulsMarket
description: SoulsMarket is a unique economy plugin where players collect "Souls" based on kills (mobs or players)  and trade them in a "Black Market" for powerful items, or use them to place bounties on rivals.
body:
![SM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e85bf79cda439d4949f8b85ef2c1a0d2a78ac32_0.webp)

**SoulsMarket - Plugin Overview**

[Discord Link](https://discord.gg/E6G8x4qYDf)

  SoulsMarket is a unique economy plugin where players collect **"Souls"** based on kills (mobs or players) and trade them in a "Black Market" for powerful items, or use them to place bounties on rivals.

# Features 

- > Dynamic Soul Drops: Earn souls by defeating mobs (Zombies, Skeletons, Creepers, etc.). Every drop chance and amount is fully configurable.
- > Customizable Drop Mechanics: Choose how souls appear! You can configure souls to drop on the ground as physical items.
- > Immersive Collection: Enable or disable a dedicated Action Bar message when souls are collected to suit your server's style.
- > Bounty System: Use /soulbounty <player> <amount> to set souls as rewards for hunting other players.
- > Death Penalties: Fully adjustable soul loss settings upon player death.
- > Extensive Blackmarket: A built-in /blackmarket GUI. Customise items, prices, and rewards directly via the config.yml.

**Storage:**
- SQLite and mySQL support!

Player Commands
1. /souls — Check your current soul balance.
1. /souls <player> — Check another player's balance.
1. /blackmarket — Open the Black Market GUI.
2. /soulbounty - Open SoulBounty GUI.
1. /soulbounty <player> <amount> — Place a bounty on someone.
   
Admin Commands

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Permission: souls.admin

</details>



1. /soulsadmin add <player> <amount> — Give souls to a player.
1. /soulsadmin remove <player> <amount> — Take souls from a player.
1. /soulsadmin set <player> <amount> — Set a player's soul balance.
1. /soulsadmin reload — Reload configuration and GUI files.
2. /sm editor - allows to edit blackmarket from ingame.
   
Placeholders:
- %souls_amount% – Displays your current soul balance.
- %souls_activebounty% – Displays your active bounty.
- %souls_bounty_top% – Displays the player with the highest active bounty.
- %souls_bounty_top_amount% – Displays the value of the highest active bounty.
